scenes.name: Title
scenes.text: Responsible and strategic use of AI. [pause] A framework for thoughtful integration.

scenes.name: Risks
scenes.text: AI can accelerate the right answer. [pause] That is exactly where the danger lives. [pause] Without intention — passive consumption. Reduced effort. Avoidance of struggle. Dependence.

scenes.name: Framework
scenes.text: A four-step framework for responsible use. [pause] Objective. Mode. Autonomy. Reflection. [pause] Each step is a deliberate pedagogical choice.

scenes.name: Step 1
scenes.text: Step one — define the objective. [pause] Conceptual understanding? Procedural skill? Analytical ability? [pause] The objective determines everything that follows.

scenes.name: Step 2
scenes.text: Step two — choose the mode. [pause] Tutor. Practice. Knowledge structuring. Source of examples. [pause] Each mode serves different purposes. Choose deliberately.

scenes.name: Step 3
scenes.text: Step three — define autonomy. [pause] Where does the student work alone? Where do they work with AI? [pause] Draw the line clearly — for the student and for yourself.

scenes.name: Step 4
scenes.text: Step four — plan reflection without AI. [pause] Every activity ends with the student articulating what they learned, alone. [pause] That is how knowledge becomes theirs.

scenes.name: Test
scenes.text: One question keeps you honest. [pause] If I remove the AI from this activity — can the student still demonstrate the objective?

scenes.name: Closing
scenes.text: Tool with purpose. [pause] Learning that lasts.
